content.en:
"The Golden Ancestor Monument?"

When Ye Tian heard this name, he was a little puzzled.

Soon, the Fire Emblem War Ancestor explained the Golden Ancestor Tablet in detail.

To put it simply, the Golden Ancestor Monument is also a holy artifact, but it is not a pure holy artifact, but the ancestor transformed a special kind of sacred monument, thus integrating its own Ancestor Dao into it, thus producing a special change.

Once you visit the Golden Ancestor Monument, there is a glimmer of hope to embark on the path of the ancestors.

In other words, the Golden Ancestor Monument has the hope of allowing the Supreme Domain Ancestors to break through.

However, the Domain Ancestors were unable to enter that place, and only the creatures of the realm below the Domain Ancestors were allowed to enter it.

The ancestors couldn't get in, and if they forced their way in, they could only destroy the treasure land.

But the ancestors were not willing to waste such a treasure land, so naturally they would not waste it.

The original name of this place was the Golden Ancestor Realm, but it was later occupied by the Destruction Holy Clan, so it was renamed the Holy Golden Realm.

Although the Holy Gold Realm is under the control of the Destruction Holy Clan, the Dark Holy Realm also has some tokens, which can be used to send people into the Holy Gold Realm.

The number of places that can destroy the Holy Clan to enter the Holy Gold Realm is even larger, far exceeding the quota of the Dark Holy Realm.

Therefore, under normal circumstances, the ten holy gates of the Dark Sanctuary would not dare to send them back to one realm, otherwise they would be sent to death.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, if it were another Holy Son, I would definitely not send him in, but you are different, you have mastered a variety of holy techniques, and now your Eternal Immortal Holy Body is complete again, and your strength is much stronger than at the beginning. According to my understanding, there are probably no geniuses in the Destruction Saint Clan's generation who can threaten your life, and even if they besiege you, you have the strength to save your life. Even, you can kill their genius. Therefore, if you enter there, you may be able to cultivate a holy technique to the consummation realm with the help of the Golden Ancestor Tablet, and you will leave safely! Of course, it is up to you to decide whether to go or not!"

"Lord Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor, I'm willing to go!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He had a general understanding of the so-called Golden Ancestor Tablet, which should be a weakening of the Ancestor Law, and for the Supreme Domain Ancestors, it was just an increase in the chance to enter the Ancestor.

But for him, with the help of the Golden Ancestor Tablet and the help of the Ancestor Method, the effect should be not much different.

After all, for him, the Golden Ancestor Tablet and the Ancestor Law are too profound and mysterious, and they can both assist in comprehending the Holy Technique, and they are almost useless at the moment.

"This is a teleportation token to enter the Holy Gold Realm, and anywhere in the Dark Forbidden Realm, it can be urged to enter the Holy Gold Realm. Once you leave, it will be taken away by the Holy Netherworld, but you will return to where you are, so you don't have to worry about not coming back. "

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor handed the token to Ye Tian and explained.

"Thank you, Lord Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

"Remember, be careful, come back alive!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestral Road.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded softly.

Leaving the Battle Realm Tower, Ye Tian returned to the Human Realm and began to cultivate hard.

Because it is not yet the day when the Holy Gold Realm will open, even if you open the token now, there is no way to enter the Holy Gold Realm.

Therefore, he had to wait some days.

------------------

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian found that the token of the Holy Gold Realm began to flicker, which meant that the Holy Gold Realm was opened.

"Copy the body!"

Ye Tian copied his body, and a copied body appeared.

That's right, he didn't plan to go to the body at all, so he let the copy body go.

In this case, even if it falls, it will not be a big loss for him.

Ye Tian brought some secret treasures, even the Forbidden Yuan Blade, which was to prevent accidents.

After all, he also wanted to obtain some good things in the Holy Gold Realm, and he also wanted to comprehend the Holy Technique to the Consummation Realm, so he naturally wanted to maintain a stronger combat power.

If you come out alive, you will make a lot of money.

If it falls, it's a big deal to lose a holy relic.

Anyway, it was a holy relic given by the Battle Gate, and he didn't feel distressed.

Ye Tian's treasures and holy relics, copying the body can also be used, after all, they are all exactly the same body, even the soul is the same, naturally there is no difference.

Since it was a copy of the body to go to the Holy Gold Realm, Ye Tian did not greet anyone.

"Turn on the token!"

The Holy Gold Realm Token emitted a cloud of light that enveloped Ye Tian's copy body, and instantly pierced through the void and disappeared.

Transmission!

This teleportation took a long time, until a long time later, maybe days, maybe months.

In the end, Ye Tian arrived at the Holy Golden Realm.

......

In an area between the Dark Sanctuary and the Dark Destruction Domain, there is a treasure land called the Holy Gold Realm.

On this day, a large number of Destruction Saint Ancestor geniuses and other clan geniuses affiliated with the Destruction Saint Clan came to the Holy Gold Realm under the escort of the Supreme Domain Ancestors.

Whoa!!!

One by one, the geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain entered the Holy Gold Realm.

Abrupt.

Two rays of light crossed the void and entered the Holy Gold Realm, and even the Supreme Domain Ancestors couldn't stop it.

"Hmph, there are two geniuses from the Dark Sacred Realm who have entered the Holy Gold Realm, and they are so bold. Listen, after entering the Holy Gold Realm, find those two geniuses of the Dark Sacred Realm and kill them!"

The Supreme Domain Ancestors commanded.

"Yes!"

One by one, the geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain exuded a destructive aura and said cruelly.

-----------------

"This is the Holy Golden Realm!"

Ye Tian appeared on the land of the Holy Gold Realm, his eyes looked around, and he was full of curiosity about everything here.

First of all, the rules here are very strong, far beyond the outside world.

Secondly, there are many treasures here.

With just a slight sweep of his divine sense, he saw a large number of forbidden treasures and a few forbidden treasures.

These treasures seem to be weeds here, which shows how many treasures there are here.

Ye Tian didn't dislike these treasures, and collected them one by one.

After all, the Terran family has a great cause, and if these treasures are sent to the Terran treasury, it is enough to cultivate a large number of Terran geniuses, so why waste it?

It didn't take long.

Ye Tian sensed the breath of a living being, the other party looked very strange, although it was a human form, all the eyes on his body were filled with a destructive aura.

"It is the Hundred-Eyed Clan of the Dark Destruction Domain, one of the three thousand evil clans under the command of the Destruction Sacred Bead!"

Ye Tian recognized it at a glance, after all, he had also done his homework before coming, and learned some information about the Dark Destruction Domain from the battle gate, although he didn't know much, but he knew a lot about each race.

Among them, this hundred-eyed clan is included.
